description: The Wiggler component is used to make a FloatQ rotate randomly. Usually used on a slot's rotation.

fields._offset: The base value to "add" to when rotating.
fields._speed: How fast to wiggle on each axis.
fields._magnitude: How much to wiggle on each axis
fields._seed: the seed for the randomness of the wiggle.

usage: Used in tails, flags, antennas, and much more random wobbly rotating things.
